login.title: Sign in
login.subtitle: Access Laundry OS
login.error: Login failed. Check your phone and password.

signup.title: Create your customer account
signup.subtitle: Customer signup only. Staff and admin accounts are not created here.
signup.success: Account created successfully. Please sign in.
signup.customerOnlyNote: This signup route is for customers only.

forbidden.title: Access not allowed
forbidden.subtitle: This portal is not available for your current role.
forbidden.body: Use the correct portal for your account or sign in again with the right credentials.

componentsPage.title: Mimo UI Kit
componentsPage.subtitle: Chapter 7.2 component library gallery.
componentsPage.useForDashboards: Use for dashboards, panels, and forms.

help.label: Need help?
help.publicBody: Find setup guidance, order help, and direct support.
help.orderBody: Use this help entry when you need support on a specific order.
help.taskBody: Use this help entry when a pickup, dropoff, or stop proof needs attention.
help.financeBody: Use this help entry for payout, balance, or settlement questions.
help.generalBody: Use this help entry when you need guidance for the current screen.
help.adminDevBody: Use the help center for access, workflow, and operational guidance.

customer.firstRunBody: Complete your first setup in two short steps, then start placing orders.
customer.stepOneBody: Pick the language you want to use right now. You can change it later.
customer.stepTwoBody: Check your name and phone so your first order flow starts clearly.
customer.homeBody: Track your active order, start a new request, and get help from one clear place.
customer.ordersBody: Your active and recent orders will appear here.

driver.homeBody: Review today's route, complete proofs, and handle cash prompts with minimal taps.
driver.setupBody: Review route basics, proof rules, and cash handling before you start work.
checklist: Confirm your phone is charged and location is on.
Review proof rules before your first stop.
Know where to get help if a stop cannot be completed.

hub.dashboardBody: Move work through intake, processing, QC, and dispatch from one operational surface.
hub.setupBody: Review intake, stage movement, and dispatch basics before processing live work.
checklist: Keep stage updates accurate and immediate.
Escalate blocked or failed items through help.

affiliate.dashboardBody: Create walk-in orders fast, track shop handovers, and review simple earnings visibility.
affiliate.staffSetupBody: Review walk-in intake, handover rules, and customer support handoff.
affiliate.adminSetupBody: Review shop activity, pickup readiness, and payout visibility before opening.
staffChecklist: Use the fast walk-in flow for every new shop order.
Confirm each handover clearly before release.
Use help when an order needs intervention.
adminChecklist: Review shop order flow and pickup readiness.
Check payout and balance visibility daily.
Use help for payout or access issues.

home.title: Your laundry at a glance
home.subtitle: See your active order, take the next step, or open recent orders.
home.recentOrdersBody: Open any recent order to see status, payment, and support.
home.helpTitle: Need help with your current laundry?

orders.title: Your orders
orders.subtitle: Browse recent and past orders in one place.

detail.title: Order detail
detail.subtitle: Track progress, confirm payment visibility, and get help if needed.

profile.title: Your profile
profile.subtitle: Keep your account basics, addresses, language, and receipts easy to reach.

today.title: Today
today.subtitle: See the next stop fast and keep the day moving.
today.nextTaskBody: Start the next stop with one clear action.

tasks.title: Tasks
tasks.subtitle: Review all assigned stops in one simple list.

stop.title: Stop detail
stop.issueBody: Use this only when the stop cannot continue normally.
stop.supportingDetails: Customer notes, route context, and operational detail stay below the action area.

proof.title: Proof action
proof.body: Complete the required proof step before moving on.

cash.title: Cash collection
cash.body: Collect and confirm cash only when this stop requires it.
cash.proofNote: Proof and cash may both be required before the stop is complete.
cash.todaySummaryBody: Keep cash visibility clear without turning this into a finance screen.
cash.reviewNeeded: Review needed before end of day reconciliation.
cash.reconciliationEntry: End-of-day reconciliation is visible here when review is needed.

sync.statusHint: Keep going. Your progress state stays visible.
sync.failedAction: This action did not sync yet

profile.title: Profile
profile.subtitle: Keep personal and end-of-day details simple.

dashboard.title: Shop operations
dashboard.subtitle: Create walk-in orders fast, handle pickup clearly, and stay inside your shop scope.
dashboard.supportBody: Use the support centre when a customer issue, delay, or handoff question needs help.

ordersNew.title: Create a new shop order
ordersNew.subtitle: Capture only what is needed and move to the next useful screen immediately.

handoff.shopPickup: Customer will pick up at the shop

orders.title: Orders
orders.subtitle: Only orders from this shop are shown here.

orderDetail.subtitle: This screen is the shop-owned truth surface for the order.
orderDetail.helpBody: Use help when pickup cannot complete cleanly or the customer needs support.
orderDetail.readyBody: This order is ready for the customer. Confirm pickup when the handoff is complete.
orderDetail.notReadyBody: This order is not ready for pickup yet. Stay on the current status and review again later.
orderDetail.pickedUpBody: The customer handoff is complete for this shop order.

finance.title: Earnings and payouts
finance.subtitle: A simple finance summary for affiliate admin only.
finance.forbiddenTitle: Finance is limited to affiliate admin
finance.forbiddenBody: Your role does not have access to finance visibility for this shop.

state.noOrdersBody: Create the first walk-in order for this shop to start today's flow.

admin.nav.label: Admin navigation
admin.page.dashboardTitle: Run daily operations from one command center
admin.page.dashboardBody: See pressure, urgent actions, finance signals, and platform-wide order visibility without hunting across disconnected screens.
admin.page.ordersBody: Review live orders with practical filters, clear attribution, and safe quick-open behavior.
admin.page.operationsBody: Monitor zones, hubs, affiliates, drivers, and versioned pricing from one coherent workspace.
admin.page.financeBody: Track collections, balances, payouts, daily close blockers, and read-only oversight in one business-ready surface.
admin.dashboard.actionQueueBody: This is the main admin focus area for what needs intervention now.
admin.dashboard.pressureSummaryBody: Operational pressure stays compact and decision-ready.
admin.dashboard.pressureSummaryItem1: Kariakoo intake remains above the normal mid-day range.
admin.dashboard.pressureSummaryItem2: North Hub delivery capacity is stable but one refund review is still open.
admin.dashboard.pressureSummaryItem3: Same-day promises should stay conservative in Temeke until driver pressure clears.
admin.dashboard.financeSignalBody: Keep payment, payout, and close risk visible without turning the dashboard into a report museum.
admin.dashboard.financeSignalItem1: One affiliate payout pack is waiting for approval.
admin.dashboard.financeSignalItem2: One hub is blocked on daily close because of driver cash variance.
admin.dashboard.financeSignalItem3: Refund review remains open on one delivery order.
admin.dashboard.globalListBody: Compact platform-wide list for quick review and safe order open.
admin.orders.filtersBody: Use shallow practical filters only. Keep active filters visible and easy to clear.
admin.orders.paginationSummary: Showing the current admin oversight page
admin.operations.pricingBody: Version truth stays clear: create, stage, and activate without mutating the current active plan.
admin.operations.columns.name: Name
admin.orderDetail.title: Order source of truth
admin.orderDetail.body: Use this page for safe review of attribution, status, payment state, and issue context.
admin.orderDetail.issueContextBody: Exceptions stay visible here without duplicating a full operating console inside the order page.
admin.state.noUrgentIssuesBody: The queue is clear enough to continue normal monitoring.
admin.state.noFilteredOrdersBody: Try widening status, zone, or issue filters.
admin.queue.item1.title: Temeke hub is carrying two delayed same-day orders
admin.queue.item2.title: Kariakoo affiliate payout pack is pending review
admin.queue.item3.title: Three processing exceptions need admin visibility

dev.home.title: DevAdmin Console
dev.home.subtitle: Inspect platform health, review operational risk, and use controlled internal tools safely.
dev.monitoring.title: Monitoring signals
dev.monitoring.description: See what needs inspection now before taking action.
dev.monitoring.signalBacklogSummary: Fulfillment jobs are waiting longer than expected in one worker lane.
dev.monitoring.signalLatencySummary: Recent retries are completing, but response time is slower than target.
dev.monitoring.signalAuditSummary: Recent DevAdmin actions are being recorded correctly.
dev.tools.title: Tools
dev.tools.subtitle: Review failed jobs, feature flags, and override tools from one controlled surface.
dev.jobs.title: Failed jobs
dev.jobs.description: Review failures from a clear detail view before retrying.
dev.jobs.snapshotDescription: Visible failures that may need inspection or a controlled retry.
dev.jobs.retryAuditReminder: Retry actions should be deliberate and visible in the audit trail.
dev.jobs.summaryFulfillment: Order event sync paused after one worker timeout.
dev.jobs.summaryPayout: Payout close job stopped before final ledger handoff.
dev.jobs.detailsFulfillment: The worker returned a timeout after reading a zone-linked dispatch payload.
dev.jobs.detailsPayout: The payout run completed preparation but failed before settlement confirmation.
dev.flags.title: Feature flags
dev.flags.description: Review purpose, scope, and current state before changing behavior.
dev.flags.expressRolloutSummary: Controls staged express visibility for one active zone.
dev.flags.autoDispatchSummary: Controls automated dispatch assignment for eligible work.
dev.override.title: Override tools
dev.override.description: Use exceptional controls only with a clear reason and visible auditability.
dev.override.auditWarning: Overrides are exceptional actions and must be justified.
dev.override.reasonPlaceholder: Enter the operational reason for this action.
dev.override.reasonRequired: A reason is required before this override can be applied.
dev.override.rebuildFeedSummary: Rebuilds the internal order feed after a controlled recovery event.
dev.override.releaseDriverLockSummary: Attempts a controlled release of a dispatch lock after review.
dev.activity.title: Activity
dev.activity.subtitle: Review accountable DevAdmin actions by actor, action, target, time, and outcome.
dev.activity.shortcutDescription: Open the audit-facing activity view for recent DevAdmin actions.
dev.activity.shortcutBody: Review recent retries, flag changes, and overrides from one readable activity surface.
dev.activity.filterDescription: Filter recent activity without turning the activity view into an action launcher.
dev.activity.logDescription: Recent DevAdmin actions recorded for accountability.
dev.awareness.title: Control awareness
dev.awareness.description: Keep flag and override risk visible before action is taken.
dev.awareness.flags: Feature flag changes should be explicit and controlled.
dev.awareness.override: Override actions require reason capture and audit visibility.
dev.diagnostics.title: Diagnostics
dev.diagnostics.subtitle: Review structured system health and failure context before using tools.
dev.diagnostics.systemHealthDescription: Readable platform health signals grouped by operational area.
dev.diagnostics.queueDescription: Read queue and worker condition before choosing a response.
dev.diagnostics.workerHealthBody: One worker lane is degraded and needs review before retry-heavy actions continue.
dev.diagnostics.queueBacklogBody: A small queue backlog is visible, but intake remains readable and controlled.
dev.diagnostics.recentFailuresDescriptio: Recent failures shown with enough context to support diagnosis first.
dev.diagnostics.escalationDescription: Use human escalation when diagnosis shows platform risk beyond safe tool usage.
dev.diagnostics.escalationBody: If failures continue after a controlled retry, escalate through the approved operations path.
